title: Reviewing protocol of SLR of academic literature and industry reports run under GameHearts project
author: Klimas, Patrycja
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a reviewing protocol presenting the steps of systematic literture review on cross-indusry cooperation between video game industry and other cultural and creative industries. Review covered both academic articles and industry reports. Data collection and analysis was implemented in 2024. The literature and reports have been used to prepare  deliverable 3.1. entitled State-of-the-art report.  It is a part of the European project  GAMEHEARTS: Games, Heritage, Arts, & Sport: the economic, social, and cultural value of the European videogame ecosystem  financed by European Union under the grant  agreement ID: 101132543. Project's DOI:  10.3030/101132543  Project's website: gamehearts.eu. Project's profile at CORDIS portal: https://cordis.europa.eu/project/id/101132543.
